rules.rule_text:
rule win_mal_Formgrabber
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects Formgrabber Plugin"
		author = "RussianPanda"
		date = "2025-2-13"
		hash = "33ea72b46af7bb2ecc0775f7536d3259f34bd7a13e298cac66649ee694097c2e"

	strings:
		$s1 = "frmgrb"
		$s2 = "WebfakeRecords"
		$s3 = "urlblocklist"
		$s4 = "mscoree.dll"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and all of them
}
